summary: Tests cover core cleanup logic (all three policies) and include workflow structure validation with act integration. However, significant gaps exist: (1) CLI functionality (main function, argument parsing, file I/O) is completely untested; (2) maxTotalBytes policy missing from act integration cases; (3) edge cases undercovered (boundary values like keepLatestPerWorkflow=0, empty artifact lists, malformed inputs). Unit tests are well-structured but superficial; act tests limited to 3 cases and don't verify dryRun output differences. Would catch basic policy logic regressions but miss CLI-related and error-handling failures.
